expectations.evidence: Inventory table lists 19 skills across both Claude and Codex systems with clear agent-system labels

expectations.text: Classifies each skill into one of the 9 categories
expectations.evidence: Every skill has a category assignment (CI/CD, Library & API Reference, Business Process, Code Quality, Product Verification, Runbooks). Categories match the reference taxonomy.

expectations.text: Provides per-skill individual scoring (not just a generic summary)
expectations.evidence: Each of the 19 skills has its own section with an X/8 score, a full checklist table, and specific top issues

Dedicated 'Repo-Level Gap Analysis' section identifies missing categories (Scaffolding, Data Fetching, Infrastructure) and structural gaps (no web verification skill, agent-browser/slack duplication, simplify sync)
Per-skill findings ordered by score (lowest first = highest priority). Quick wins section has impact/effort ratings. Issues labeled P1/P2.
Each issue has specific fix suggestions: 'Remove hardcoded ref numbers and replace with semantic descriptions', 'Add gotchas section covering TeamCreate pitfalls', etc.
